welcome.title: Welcome to QualoraHub Demo
welcome.description: Experience how QualoraHub simplifies farm management. In just a few minutes, you'll simulate a complete crop production cycle and see real insights.

cropManagement.title: Crop Management
cropManagement.description: Set up your crop and track its production cycle

wasteTracking.title: Waste Tracking
wasteTracking.description: Log waste events to uncover hidden losses

smartInsights.title: Smart Insights
smartInsights.description: See actionable insights from your farm data

learnItems.productionCycles: How production cycles help track costs and yields
learnItems.operations: How operations affect your bottom line
learnItems.wasteTracking: How waste tracking reveals hidden losses
learnItems.actionableInsights: How data transforms into actionable insights

farmIdentity.title: Name Your Farm
farmIdentity.description: Give your demo farm an identity. This name will appear in your dashboard.
farmIdentity.note: 💡 This is a demo — your data stays local and is not saved anywhere.

cropSetup.title: Select Your Crop
cropSetup.description: Choose a crop type and variety for your production cycle.
cropSetup.note: 🌱 For this demo, we assume one default field and production lot.

startCycle.title: Production Cycle Started!
startCycle.description: Your crop is now active. Let's track its journey from planting to harvest.
startCycle.whyDescription: Production cycles help you track costs, yields, waste, and performance for each crop from start to finish. This data drives better decisions.

planting.title: Operation 1: Planting
planting.description: Log your planting operation. This is the first step in your production cycle.
planting.costHint: Include seeds, labor, and equipment costs
planting.note: ✅ This operation will be logged and contribute to your total cycle cost.

maintenance.title: Operation 2: Maintenance
maintenance.description: Log irrigation and fertilization costs to track ongoing expenses.
maintenance.note: 💡 In a real system, you'd log many more operations. This demo shows a simplified flow.

wasteEvent.title: Log a Waste Event
wasteEvent.description: This is crucial — tracking waste reveals hidden losses that often go unnoticed.
wasteEvent.whyDescription: Tracking waste makes hidden losses visible. This waste is now linked to your production cycle and will appear in your insights.

harvest.title: Operation 3: Harvest
harvest.description: Time to harvest! Enter your yield to complete the production cycle.
harvest.quantityHint: Total yield from this production cycle
harvest.completeDescription: After harvest, we'll close the cycle and show you insights about costs, yield, and waste for this production period.

dashboardOverview.title: {{farmName}} — Farm Overview
dashboardOverview.description: Your personalized dashboard with real-time insights

yieldInsights.title: Yield Insights
yieldInsights.description: Track your harvest performance over time

costSummary.title: Cost & Production Summary
costSummary.description: Breakdown of your production cycle costs

wasteInsights.title: Waste Insights
wasteInsights.description: Understanding your losses is the first step to reducing them
wasteInsights.quote: "This waste would often go unnoticed without tracking"

impact.title: The Power of Visibility

withoutTracking.title: Without Tracking
withoutTracking.description: This waste is invisible. Losses accumulate silently, costs go unexplained, and the same problems repeat season after season.

withQualoraHub.title: With QualoraHub
withQualoraHub.description: Every loss becomes actionable data. You see patterns, identify root causes, and make informed decisions to reduce waste over time.

impact.conclusion: Better visibility → Better decisions → Lower waste

completion.title: Demo Complete!
completion.description: You've experienced a simplified production cycle. Real farms track much more detail — multiple operations, detailed inputs, quality classifications, and more.
completion.note: 💡 Ready to transform your farm management? Sign up to get started with full access to all QualoraHub features.

auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.checkEmailDesc: We've sent a password reset link to your email. The link will expire in 30 minutes.
auth.resetPasswordDesc: Enter your new password below. Make sure it's secure.
auth.passwordUpdatedDesc: Your password has been successfully updated. You can now sign in with your new password.
auth.linkExpiredDesc: This password reset link has expired or is invalid. Please request a new one.
auth.passwordRequirements: At least 6 characters with one uppercase letter and one number
auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.passwordNeedsUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
auth.passwordNeedsNumber: Password must contain at least one number
